title: Show Column Name in Calendar View
excerpt:
Hello Monday.com Community!

posts.author: RyanSWS (Ryan Gottshall)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday.com Community!

On my board, I have multiple date columns that indicate different “milestone” deadlines that occur throughout the lifecycle of each item. If I add all these date columns to the calendar view (or dashboard widget) it just shows the item name on each date, but doesn’t display which column that date is referring to. Is there a way for the calendar to show “Item Name / Column Name” or something similar?

Thanks for your help!

posts.author: johncapone (John)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I am trying to figure out this same thing. I have multiple dates in a process and would like these grouped by project displaying on calendar. Seems the way to do this is to group each project perhaps and show the column name but I get the only an option to who the item name.
